title: Qlovean Mons [Cobblemon]
description: Adds Variants from the Qlovean Wilds Region  to Cobblemon. Lore Friendly Fake Variants of Existing Pokemon.
body:
![Qlovean Mons Header](https://i.imgur.com/LHGpJxY.png)
# 🍀 Qlovean Mons 🍀
This pack adds lore-friendly Qlovean forms of existing Cobblemon to your world. We have a balancing team to make sure that some of the Qlovean Mons are competetively viable but not overpowered. It is used in the Qlovean Wilds SMP, which has many competetive trainers that battle it out to be the champion every two weeks. So we strive to create competetively viable and balanced Cobblemon.

## Which Pokemon are added in the pack?
✅ Qlovean Feebas - Water Type - Reskin of Feebas that is adapted to the colder climates and only spawns there.

✅ Qlovean Milotic - Water/Ice Type - Milotic with a new dual type. Also found in the colder biomes.

✅ Qlovean Veluza - Water/Psychic Type - Reskin of Veluza that better blends in with the Lush Oceans of the Qlovean Wilds.

✅ Qlovean Hoothoot - Ice/Flying Type - A more agile hoothoot with a dual type. Blending in seemlessly with the snow.

✅ Qlovean Noctowl - Ice/Flying Type - This Noctowl doesn't back down from a fight with it's new dual type and a more aerodynamic design.

✅ Qlovean Aipom - Normal Type - Reskin of Aipom with a slightly altered move set to better defend itself from other ape-like Cobblemon.

✅ Qlovean Ambipom - Normal/Fighting Type - This Ambipom truly can defend itself and other Aipom from those pesky bullies. They love to fight!

✅ Qlovean Wooper - Water/Ghost Type - A tragic death led to this cute thing existing, eternally bound to the thing that killed them.

✅ Qlovean Quagsire - Water/Ghost Type - Truly a horrifiying sight when adventuring a Qlovean Swamp. Don't let them get too 

✅ Qlovean Murkrow - Dark/Flying - With a frail body and a rare skin condition, it's hope for survival ain't good.

✅ Qlovean Honchkrow - Ghost/Flying - Defying all  odds, whe a Qlovean Murkrow gets a hold of a Totem of Undying it simply refuses to die and become a Honchkrow!

✅ Qlovean Foongus - Fairy/Poison - This friendly guy doesn't want to lure trainers, he wants to befriend them!

✅ Qlovean Amoonguss - Fairy/Poison - They are not the most social creatures, not because they don't like you! But they are rather busy being... Well.. Intoxicated.

✅ Qlovean Torkoal - Water - Some Torkoal get sick of the heat of volcanos, so they decided to chill out at the bottom of the ocean. Who can blame them?

## 🍀 What is the Qlovean Wilds? 🍀
The Qlovean Wilds is a huge open wilderness that surrounds Qlovea. A fictional region that the Qlovean Wilds Server is set in. 

Vast and untamed, the Qlovean Wilds stretch beyond the edges of civilization, a land shaped by forces long forgotten. Once, an ancient people walked these grounds, their machines and lost technology woven into the earth itself. Now, their creations lie dormant beneath the soil, pulsing with unseen energy. The land stirs with its touch—creatures twist and change, storms rage without warning, and the echoes of a forgotten age whisper through the winds.

## 🍀 Can I use it in a Mod Pack / On My Server? 🍀
Yes you can. Feel free to change the spawns, drops and abilities. But don't change the Packn Name, Qlovean Form Name or Dex Entries. 

## 🍀 Can you make a Qlovean Form of *****? 🍀
No we can't. We made this pack for our own Community Server but wanted to share it with the rest of the Cobblemon community so everyone can enjoy these little variants. We decide the next Cobblemon to get a Qlovean form by looking at our own Server and where it could receive some love. Which Cobblemon do people use and love, but could we give a little extra flair.

## 🍀 When is the next Qlovean Form added? 🍀
We work with a team on it, but all do it as a hobby while we also run a Cobblemon Server with events and quests, which takes priority over the pack. So no release time for new updates, but do know that multiple people are working on adding new mons to it.

## 🍀 Can I join the Qlovean Wilds Server? 🍀
Yes you can, by joining our [Discord](https://discord.gg/qapbjv7KSY) and filling in the  [Application Form](https://forms.gle/meofxumDvpZdFFMN9)

## 🍀 Can I help create more Qlovean Forms? 🍀
Yes you can. We have a strict set of rules for Qlovean Mons and some quality standards we live up to. Best way to help is to get in contact with me through Discord.
